design_intent: Make explicit execution-boundary resource ownership deterministic and restore all required PR checks without changing the session-kernel objective or public ownership modes.

objective.definition: Required checks passing on PR 346 at the current head.

anti_goals.read_method: Reject module mocks, global patches, and internal reaches
Run lint and inspect changed execution edges

anti_goals.source_of_truth: Structured lifetime and React cleanup tests
anti_goals.read_method: Replay close order and durable-state checks
Prove sibling and nested explicit boundaries do not share owner-local resources
Allow only the approved branch push; no publication, release, merge, or production call
Keep the 16-contract verifier green if the surface is touched
Reject new observation or context exports
Require deterministic replay and an independent reviewer before acceptance

anti_goals.source_of_truth: Generic Lite and React boundary tests
anti_goals.read_method: Require order-independent tests at both core and adapter seams

anti_goals.source_of_truth: Focused suites, root lint, and PR CI
anti_goals.read_method: Run every touched surface and require all six PR checks

anti_goals.activation_condition: Any source, test, doc, or OKRA change
anti_goals.source_of_truth: Repository lint, plain-wording check, and diff check
anti_goals.read_method: Run style gates and inspect the narrow diff
Keep work to the proven boundary lookup defect and its tests
Use the store helper for metrics, events, check-ins, and terminal records

anti_goals.source_of_truth: Prior terminal record, CI failure, successor store, and final evidence
anti_goals.read_method: Preserve the contradiction and reject stale or self-certified success

prior_anti_goal_review.reason: Core and React tests must stay on the public scope seam
Resource lookup remains a controlled graph edge
Only the approved PR branch push is allowed
The prior production proof remains attached to this branch
Lite ownership semantics require generic proof
The previous terminal claim is contradicted by CI

objective.read_method: Read statusCheckRollup at the current head

anti_goals.source_of_truth: Named tests, lint, CI, review, and store evidence

allowed: Edit Lite resource lookup and directly affected core or React contracts
Run local gates and independent review
Commit and push a narrow correction to PR 346
forbidden: Change ownership modes or unrelated APIs
Publish, release, deploy, merge, or close the PR
Force push or rewrite prior terminal evidence
Use module mocks, global patches, hidden effects, or unrelated cleanup
approval_gates: Only the human may change the frame, release scope, or merge decision
action_envelope.rollback: Revert only the narrow successor commit if its direct and CI gates fail
